hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: Saying Who You Are -- Present Simple & Your Role
lesson.menu_desc: Your role and team at Sucafina -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- Present Simple for Identity and Professional Role
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 2 -- Saying Who You Are

listenings.text: Hello, this is a short message from the Geneva office. Welcome again to the international team. At Sucafina, we work with coffee suppliers around the world. Your role is important. You handle contracts with our global clients, and you work with the export team every day. We are a remote team, so we talk by email and video calls. Have a great first week, and welcome aboard.

Hi, this is Fernanda. I work at Sucafina, a global coffee company. My role is in the trading office. I work with international suppliers, and I help with export contracts. My team is remote, so we work from many countries. We do not work in the same office, but we talk every day. I love my new role, and I am ready to learn more.

extra_audio.text: Fernanda starts her message. She says she works at Sucafina. She talks about her role in the trading office. She explains that her team is remote. She says they work with global suppliers.
